Parameter.name: CdhCore_cmdDisp_CommandsDispatched
Parameter.shortDescription: Number of commands dispatched

Parameter.name: CdhCore_cmdDisp_CommandErrors
Parameter.shortDescription: Number of command errors

Parameter.shortDescription: Number of commands drooped due to buffer overflow

Parameter.name: CdhCore_health_PingLateWarnings
Parameter.shortDescription: Number of overrun warnings

Parameter.shortDescription: Software framework version

Parameter.shortDescription: Depth of queues of Fw::ComBuffer type

Parameter.shortDescription: Depth of queues of Fw::Buffer type

Parameter.name: ComCcsds_commsBufferManager_TotalBuffs
Parameter.shortDescription: The total buffers allocated

Parameter.shortDescription: The current number of allocated buffers

Parameter.name: ComCcsds_commsBufferManager_HiBuffs
Parameter.shortDescription: The high water mark of allocated buffers

Parameter.name: ComCcsds_commsBufferManager_NoBuffs
Parameter.shortDescription: The number of requests that couldn't return a buffer

Parameter.name: ComCcsds_commsBufferManager_EmptyBuffs
Parameter.shortDescription: The number of empty buffers returned

Parameter.name: DataProducts_dpCat_CatalogDps
Parameter.shortDescription: Number of data products in catalog

Parameter.name: DataProducts_dpCat_DpsSent
Parameter.shortDescription: Number of data products sent

Parameter.shortDescription: The number of successful buffer allocations

Parameter.shortDescription: The number of failed buffer allocations

Parameter.shortDescription: Number of data products handled

Parameter.shortDescription: Number of bytes handled

Parameter.shortDescription: The number of buffers received

Parameter.name: DataProducts_dpWriter_NumErrors
Parameter.shortDescription: The number of errors

Parameter.shortDescription: The total buffers allocated

Parameter.shortDescription: The current number of allocated buffers

Parameter.shortDescription: The high water mark of allocated buffers

Parameter.name: DataProducts_dpBufferManager_NoBuffs
Parameter.shortDescription: The number of requests that couldn't return a buffer

Parameter.name: DataProducts_dpBufferManager_EmptyBuffs
Parameter.shortDescription: The number of empty buffers returned

Parameter.shortDescription: The total number of complete files received

Parameter.name: FileHandling_fileManager_CommandsExecuted
Parameter.shortDescription: The total number of commands successfully executed

Parameter.name: FileHandling_fileManager_Errors
Parameter.shortDescription: The total number of errors

Parameter.shortDescription: Telemetry channel counting LED transitions

Parameter.name: CdhCore_cmdDisp_OpCodeDispatched
Parameter.shortDescription: Op code dispatched event

Parameter.name: CdhCore_cmdDisp_OpCodeCompleted
Parameter.shortDescription: Op code completed event

Parameter.name: CdhCore_cmdDisp_OpCodeError
Parameter.shortDescription: Op code completed with error event

Parameter.name: CdhCore_cmdDisp_MalformedCommand
Parameter.shortDescription: Received a malformed command packet

Parameter.name: CdhCore_cmdDisp_InvalidCommand
Parameter.shortDescription: Received an invalid opcode

Parameter.name: CdhCore_cmdDisp_TooManyCommands
Parameter.shortDescription: Exceeded the number of commands that can be simultaneously executed

Parameter.name: CdhCore_cmdDisp_NoOpReceived
Parameter.shortDescription: The command dispatcher has successfully received a NO-OP command

Parameter.name: CdhCore_cmdDisp_NoOpStringReceived
Parameter.shortDescription: The command dispatcher has successfully received a NO-OP command from GUI with a string

Parameter.name: CdhCore_cmdDisp_TestCmd1Args
Parameter.shortDescription: This log event message returns the TEST_CMD_1 arguments.

Parameter.name: CdhCore_cmdDisp_OpCodeReregistered
Parameter.shortDescription: Op code reregistered event

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: Opcode 0x{x} is already registered to port {}

Parameter.name: CdhCore_cmdDisp_CommandDroppedQueueOverflow
Parameter.shortDescription: This log event reports the Command Sequence Buffer port queue has overflowed.

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: Opcode 0x{x} was dropped due to buffer overflow and not processed. Context {}

Parameter.name: CdhCore_events_SEVERITY_FILTER_STATE
Parameter.shortDescription: Dump severity filter state

Parameter.name: CdhCore_events_ID_FILTER_ENABLED
Parameter.shortDescription: Indicate ID is filtered

Parameter.name: CdhCore_events_ID_FILTER_LIST_FULL
Parameter.shortDescription: Attempted to add ID to full ID filter ID

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: ID filter list is full. Cannot filter {} .

Parameter.name: CdhCore_events_ID_FILTER_REMOVED
Parameter.shortDescription: Removed an ID from the filter

Parameter.name: CdhCore_events_ID_FILTER_NOT_FOUND
Parameter.shortDescription: ID not in filter

Parameter.name: CdhCore_health_HLTH_PING_WARN
Parameter.shortDescription: Warn that a ping target is longer than the warning value

Parameter.name: CdhCore_health_HLTH_PING_LATE
Parameter.shortDescription: Declare FATAL since task is no longer responding

Parameter.name: CdhCore_health_HLTH_PING_WRONG_KEY
Parameter.shortDescription: Declare FATAL since task is no longer responding

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: Ping entry {} responded with wrong key 0x{x}

Parameter.name: CdhCore_health_HLTH_CHECK_ENABLE
Parameter.shortDescription: Report checking turned on or off

Parameter.name: CdhCore_health_HLTH_CHECK_PING
Parameter.shortDescription: Report a particular entry on or off

Parameter.name: CdhCore_health_HLTH_CHECK_LOOKUP_ERROR
Parameter.shortDescription: Entry was not found

Parameter.name: CdhCore_health_HLTH_PING_UPDATED
Parameter.shortDescription: Report changed ping

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: Health ping for {} changed to WARN {} FATAL {}

Parameter.name: CdhCore_health_HLTH_PING_INVALID_VALUES
Parameter.shortDescription: Report changed ping

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: Health ping for {} invalid values: WARN {} FATAL {}

Parameter.shortDescription: An assert happened

Parameter.name: ComCcsds_comQueue_QueueOverflow
Parameter.shortDescription: Queue overflow event

Parameter.name: ComCcsds_frameAccumulator_NoBufferAvailable
Parameter.shortDescription: An error occurred while deserializing a packet

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: Could not allocate a valid buffer to fit the detected frame

Parameter.name: ComCcsds_frameAccumulator_FrameDetectionSizeError
Parameter.shortDescription: A frame was detected whose size exceeds the internal accumulation buffer capacity. No choice but to drop the frame.

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: Reported size_out={} exceeds accumulation buffer capacity

Parameter.name: ComCcsds_commsBufferManager_NoBuffsAvailable
Parameter.shortDescription: The BufferManager was unable to allocate a requested buffer

Parameter.name: ComCcsds_commsBufferManager_NullEmptyBuffer
Parameter.shortDescription: The buffer manager received a null pointer and zero-sized buffer as a return. Probably undetected failed buffer allocation

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: Received null pointer and zero size buffer

Parameter.name: ComCcsds_fprimeRouter_SerializationError
Parameter.shortDescription: An error occurred while serializing a com buffer

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: Serializing com buffer failed with status {}

Parameter.name: ComCcsds_fprimeRouter_DeserializationError
Parameter.shortDescription: An error occurred while deserializing a packet

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: Deserializing packet type failed with status {}

Parameter.name: ComCcsds_tcDeframer_InvalidSpacecraftId
Parameter.shortDescription: Deframing received an invalid SCID

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: Invalid Spacecraft ID Received. Received: {} | Deframer configured with: {}

Parameter.name: ComCcsds_tcDeframer_InvalidFrameLength
Parameter.shortDescription: Deframing received an invalid frame length

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: Not enough data received. Header length specified: {} | Received data length: {}

Parameter.name: ComCcsds_tcDeframer_InvalidVcId
Parameter.shortDescription: Deframing received an invalid VCID

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: Invalid Virtual Channel ID Received. Header token specified: {} | Deframer configured with: {}

Parameter.name: ComCcsds_tcDeframer_InvalidCrc
Parameter.shortDescription: Deframing received an invalid checksum

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: Invalid checksum received. Trailer specified: {} | Computed on board: {}

Parameter.name: ComCcsds_spacePacketDeframer_InvalidLength
Parameter.shortDescription: Deframing received an invalid frame length

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: Invalid length received. Header specified packet byte size of {} | Actual received data length: {}

Parameter.name: ComCcsds_apidManager_UnexpectedSequenceCount
Parameter.shortDescription: Deframing received an unexpected sequence count

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: Unexpected sequence count received. Packets may have been dropped. Transmitted: {} | Expected on board: {}

Parameter.name: ComCcsds_apidManager_ApidTableFull
Parameter.shortDescription: Received an unregistered APID

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: APID Table is full, cannot generate or check sequence counts for APID: {}

Parameter.shortDescription: Error opening directory

Parameter.shortDescription: Product send complete

Parameter.shortDescription: Catalog is full

Parameter.name: DataProducts_dpCat_FileReadError
Parameter.shortDescription: Error opening file

Parameter.shortDescription: Error deserializing header data

Parameter.shortDescription: Error inserting entry into list

Parameter.shortDescription: Error inserting entry into list

Parameter.name: DataProducts_dpCat_DpCatalogFull
Parameter.shortDescription: Error inserting entry into list

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: Catalog full trying to insert DP {}

Parameter.name: DataProducts_dpCat_DpXmitInProgress
Parameter.shortDescription: Tried to build catalog while downlink process active

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: Cannot build new catalog while DPs are being transmitted

Parameter.name: DataProducts_dpCat_FileSizeError
Parameter.shortDescription: Error getting file size

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: Error reading state file {}, stat {}, offset: {}
Truncated state file {} size. offset: {} size: {}
Error transmitting DP file {}, stat {}. Halting xmit.
Error sending DP file {}, stat {}. Halting xmit.

Parameter.name: DataProducts_dpMgr_BufferAllocationFailed
Parameter.shortDescription: Buffer allocation failed

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: Buffer allocation failed for container id {}

Parameter.name: DataProducts_dpWriter_InvalidBuffer
Parameter.shortDescription: Received buffer is invalid

Parameter.name: DataProducts_dpWriter_BufferTooSmallForPacket
Parameter.shortDescription: Received buffer is too small to hold a data product packet

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: Received buffer has size {}; minimum required size is {}

Parameter.name: DataProducts_dpWriter_InvalidHeaderHash
Parameter.shortDescription: The received buffer has an invalid header hash

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: Received a buffer of size {} with an invalid header hash (stored {x}, computed {x})

Parameter.name: DataProducts_dpWriter_InvalidHeader
Parameter.shortDescription: Error occurred when deserializing the packet header

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: Received buffer of size {}; deserialization of packet header failed with error code {}

Parameter.name: DataProducts_dpWriter_BufferTooSmallForData
Parameter.shortDescription: Received buffer is too small to hold the data specified in the header

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: Received buffer has size {}; minimum required size is {}

Parameter.name: DataProducts_dpWriter_FileOpenError
Parameter.shortDescription: An error occurred when opening a file

Parameter.name: DataProducts_dpWriter_FileWriteError
Parameter.shortDescription: An error occurred when writing to a file

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: Error {} while writing {} of {} bytes to {}

Parameter.name: DataProducts_dpWriter_FileWritten
Parameter.shortDescription: File written

Parameter.name: DataProducts_dpBufferManager_NoBuffsAvailable
Parameter.shortDescription: The BufferManager was unable to allocate a requested buffer

Parameter.name: DataProducts_dpBufferManager_NullEmptyBuffer
Parameter.shortDescription: The buffer manager received a null pointer and zero-sized buffer as a return. Probably undetected failed buffer allocation

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: Received null pointer and zero size buffer

Parameter.name: FileHandling_fileUplink_BadChecksum
Parameter.shortDescription: During receipt of a file, the computed checksum value did not match the stored value

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: Bad checksum value during receipt of file {}: computed 0x{x}, read 0x{x}

Parameter.name: FileHandling_fileUplink_FileOpenError
Parameter.shortDescription: An error occurred opening a file

Parameter.name: FileHandling_fileUplink_FileReceived
Parameter.shortDescription: The File Uplink component successfully received a file

Parameter.name: FileHandling_fileUplink_FileWriteError
Parameter.shortDescription: An error occurred writing to a file

Parameter.name: FileHandling_fileUplink_InvalidReceiveMode
Parameter.shortDescription: The File Uplink component received a packet with a type that was invalid for the current receive mode

Parameter.name: FileHandling_fileUplink_PacketOutOfBounds
Parameter.shortDescription: During receipt of a file, the File Uplink component encountered a packet with offset and size out of bounds for the current file

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: Packet {} out of bounds for file {}

Parameter.name: FileHandling_fileUplink_PacketOutOfOrder
Parameter.shortDescription: The File Uplink component encountered an out-of-order packet during file receipt

Parameter.name: FileHandling_fileUplink_PacketDuplicate
Parameter.shortDescription: The File Uplink component encountered a duplicate packet during file receipt

Parameter.name: FileHandling_fileUplink_UplinkCanceled
Parameter.shortDescription: The File Uplink component received a CANCEL packet

Parameter.name: FileHandling_fileUplink_DecodeError
Parameter.shortDescription: Error decoding file packet

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: Unable to decode file packet. Status: {}

Parameter.name: FileHandling_fileUplink_InvalidPacketReceived
Parameter.shortDescription: Invalid packet received

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: Invalid packet received. Wrong packet type: {}

Parameter.name: FileHandling_fileDownlink_FileOpenError
Parameter.shortDescription: An error occurred opening a file

Parameter.name: FileHandling_fileDownlink_FileReadError
Parameter.shortDescription: An error occurred reading a file

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: Could not read file {} with status {}

Parameter.name: FileHandling_fileDownlink_FileSent
Parameter.shortDescription: The File Downlink component successfully sent a file

Parameter.name: FileHandling_fileDownlink_DownlinkCanceled
Parameter.shortDescription: The File Downlink component canceled downlink of a file

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: Canceled downlink of file {} to file {}

Parameter.name: FileHandling_fileDownlink_DownlinkTimeout
Parameter.shortDescription: The File Downlink component has detected a timeout. Downlink has been canceled.

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: Timeout occurred during downlink of file {} to file {}. Downlink has been canceled.

Parameter.name: FileHandling_fileDownlink_DownlinkPartialWarning
Parameter.shortDescription: The File Downlink component has detected a timeout. Downlink has been canceled.

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: Offset {} plus length {} is greater than source size {} for partial downlink of file {} to file {}.

Parameter.name: FileHandling_fileDownlink_DownlinkPartialFail
Parameter.shortDescription: The File Downlink component has detected a timeout. Downlink has been canceled.

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: Error occurred during partial downlink of file {} to file {}. Offset {} greater than or equal to source filesize {}.

Parameter.name: FileHandling_fileDownlink_SendDataFail
Parameter.shortDescription: The File Downlink component generated an error when trying to send a data packet.

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: Failed to send data packet from file {} at byte offset {}.

Parameter.name: FileHandling_fileDownlink_SendStarted
Parameter.shortDescription: The File Downlink component started a file download.

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: Downlink of {} bytes started from {} to {}

Parameter.name: FileHandling_fileManager_DirectoryCreateError
Parameter.shortDescription: An error occurred while attempting to create a directory

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: Could not create directory {}, returned status {}

Parameter.name: FileHandling_fileManager_DirectoryRemoveError
Parameter.shortDescription: An error occurred while attempting to remove a directory

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: Could not remove directory {}, returned status {}

Parameter.name: FileHandling_fileManager_FileMoveError
Parameter.shortDescription: An error occurred while attempting to move a file

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: Could not move file {} to file {}, returned status {}

Parameter.name: FileHandling_fileManager_FileRemoveError
Parameter.shortDescription: An error occurred while attempting to remove a file

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: Could not remove file {}, returned status {}

Parameter.name: FileHandling_fileManager_ShellCommandFailed
Parameter.shortDescription: The File System component executed a shell command that returned status non-zero

Parameter.name: FileHandling_fileManager_AppendFileFailed
Parameter.shortDescription: The File System component returned status non-zero when trying to append 2 files together

Parameter.name: FileHandling_fileManager_AppendFileSucceeded
Parameter.shortDescription: The File System component appended 2 files without error

Parameter.name: FileHandling_fileManager_ShellCommandSucceeded
Parameter.shortDescription: The File System component executed a shell command that returned status zero

Parameter.name: FileHandling_fileManager_CreateDirectorySucceeded
Parameter.shortDescription: The File System component created a new directory without error

Parameter.name: FileHandling_fileManager_RemoveDirectorySucceeded
Parameter.shortDescription: The File System component deleted and existing directory without error

Parameter.name: FileHandling_fileManager_MoveFileSucceeded
Parameter.shortDescription: The File System component moved a file to a new location without error

Parameter.name: FileHandling_fileManager_RemoveFileSucceeded
Parameter.shortDescription: The File System component deleted an existing file without error

Parameter.name: FileHandling_fileManager_AppendFileStarted
Parameter.shortDescription: The File System component appended 2 files without error

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: Appending file {} to the end of {}...

Parameter.name: FileHandling_fileManager_ShellCommandStarted
Parameter.shortDescription: The File System component began executing a shell command

Parameter.name: FileHandling_fileManager_CreateDirectoryStarted
Parameter.shortDescription: The File System component began creating a new directory

Parameter.name: FileHandling_fileManager_RemoveDirectoryStarted
Parameter.shortDescription: The File System component began deleting a directory

Parameter.name: FileHandling_fileManager_MoveFileStarted
Parameter.shortDescription: The File System component began moving a file to a new location

Parameter.name: FileHandling_fileManager_RemoveFileStarted
Parameter.shortDescription: The File System component began deleting an existing file

Parameter.name: FileHandling_fileManager_FileSizeSucceeded
Parameter.shortDescription: File size response

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: The size of file {} is {} B

Parameter.name: FileHandling_fileManager_FileSizeError
Parameter.shortDescription: Failed to get file size

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: Failed to get the size of file {}, returned status {}

Parameter.name: FileHandling_fileManager_FileSizeStarted
Parameter.shortDescription: Checking file size

Parameter.name: FileHandling_fileManager_ListDirectoryStarted
Parameter.shortDescription: Starting directory listing

Parameter.name: FileHandling_fileManager_ListDirectorySucceeded
Parameter.shortDescription: Directory listing completed successfully

Parameter.name: FileHandling_fileManager_ListDirectoryError
Parameter.shortDescription: Failed to list directory

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: Failed to list directory {}, returned status {}

Parameter.name: FileHandling_fileManager_DirectoryListing
Parameter.shortDescription: Directory listing file entry

Parameter.name: FileHandling_fileManager_DirectoryListingSubdir
Parameter.shortDescription: Directory listing subdirectory entry

Parameter.name: FileHandling_prmDb_PrmIdNotFound
Parameter.shortDescription: Parameter ID not found in database.

Parameter.name: FileHandling_prmDb_PrmIdUpdated
Parameter.shortDescription: Parameter ID updated in database

Parameter.name: FileHandling_prmDb_PrmDbFull
Parameter.shortDescription: Parameter database is full

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: Parameter DB full when adding ID 0x{x}

Parameter.name: FileHandling_prmDb_PrmIdAdded
Parameter.shortDescription: Parameter ID added to database

Parameter.name: FileHandling_prmDb_PrmFileWriteError
Parameter.shortDescription: Failed to write parameter file

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: Parameter write failed in stage {} with record {} and error {}

Parameter.name: FileHandling_prmDb_PrmFileSaveComplete
Parameter.shortDescription: Save of parameter file completed

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: Parameter file save completed. Wrote {} records.

Parameter.name: FileHandling_prmDb_PrmFileReadError
Parameter.shortDescription: Failed to read parameter file

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: Parameter file read failed in stage {} with record {} and error {}

Parameter.name: FileHandling_prmDb_PrmFileLoadComplete
Parameter.shortDescription: Load of parameter file completed

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: Parameter file load completed. Database: {}, Records: {} ({} added and {} updated).

Parameter.name: FileHandling_prmDb_PrmDbCommitComplete
Parameter.shortDescription: Committed staged parameter updates

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: Parameter DB commit complete, staged updates are now active.

Parameter.name: FileHandling_prmDb_PrmDbCopyAllComplete
Parameter.shortDescription: All parameters Copied from one DB to another

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: All parameters copied. Source database: {}, Destination database: {}.

Parameter.name: FileHandling_prmDb_PrmDbFileLoadFailed
Parameter.shortDescription: Parameter file load failed, not staging any update

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: Parameter file load failed. Clearing staging database and abandoning parameter file load.

Parameter.name: FileHandling_prmDb_PrmDbFileLoadInvalidAction
Parameter.shortDescription: Invalid Action during parameter file load

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: Invalid action during parameter file load. Current state: {}, Action (Invalid for current state): {}.

Parameter.name: LedBlinker_rateGroup1_RateGroupStarted
Parameter.shortDescription: Informational event that rate group has started

Parameter.name: LedBlinker_rateGroup1_RateGroupCycleSlip
Parameter.shortDescription: Warning event that rate group has had a cycle slip

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: Rate group cycle slipped on cycle {}

Parameter.name: LedBlinker_rateGroup2_RateGroupStarted
Parameter.shortDescription: Informational event that rate group has started

Parameter.name: LedBlinker_rateGroup2_RateGroupCycleSlip
Parameter.shortDescription: Warning event that rate group has had a cycle slip

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: Rate group cycle slipped on cycle {}

Parameter.name: LedBlinker_rateGroup3_RateGroupStarted
Parameter.shortDescription: Informational event that rate group has started

Parameter.name: LedBlinker_rateGroup3_RateGroupCycleSlip
Parameter.shortDescription: Warning event that rate group has had a cycle slip

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: Rate group cycle slipped on cycle {}

Parameter.name: LedBlinker_cmdSeq_CS_SequenceLoaded
Parameter.shortDescription: Sequence file was successfully loaded.

Parameter.name: LedBlinker_cmdSeq_CS_SequenceCanceled
Parameter.shortDescription: A command sequence was successfully canceled.

Parameter.name: LedBlinker_cmdSeq_CS_FileReadError
Parameter.shortDescription: The Sequence File Loader could not read the sequence file.

Parameter.name: LedBlinker_cmdSeq_CS_FileInvalid
Parameter.shortDescription: The sequence file format was invalid.

Parameter.name: LedBlinker_cmdSeq_CS_RecordInvalid
Parameter.shortDescription: The format of a command record was invalid.

Parameter.name: LedBlinker_cmdSeq_CS_FileSizeError
Parameter.shortDescription: The sequence file was too large.

Parameter.name: LedBlinker_cmdSeq_CS_FileNotFound
Parameter.shortDescription: The sequence file was not found

Parameter.name: LedBlinker_cmdSeq_CS_FileCrcFailure
Parameter.shortDescription: The sequence file validation failed

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: Sequence file {} had invalid CRC. Stored 0x{x}, Computed 0x{x}.

Parameter.name: LedBlinker_cmdSeq_CS_CommandComplete
Parameter.shortDescription: The Command Sequencer issued a command and received a success status in return.

Parameter.name: LedBlinker_cmdSeq_CS_SequenceComplete
Parameter.shortDescription: A command sequence successfully completed.

Parameter.name: LedBlinker_cmdSeq_CS_CommandError
Parameter.shortDescription: The Command Sequencer issued a command and received an error status in return.

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: Sequence file {}: Command {} (opcode {}) completed with error {}

Parameter.name: LedBlinker_cmdSeq_CS_InvalidMode
Parameter.shortDescription: The Command Sequencer received a command that was invalid for its current mode.

Parameter.name: LedBlinker_cmdSeq_CS_RecordMismatch
Parameter.shortDescription: Number of records in header doesn't match number in file

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: Sequence file {} header records mismatch: {} in header, found {} extra bytes.

Parameter.name: LedBlinker_cmdSeq_CS_TimeBaseMismatch
Parameter.shortDescription: The running time base doesn't match the time base in the sequence files

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: Sequence file {}: Current time base doesn't match sequence time: base: {} seq: {}

Parameter.name: LedBlinker_cmdSeq_CS_TimeContextMismatch
Parameter.shortDescription: The running time base doesn't match the time base in the sequence files

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: Sequence file {}: Current time context doesn't match sequence context: base: {} seq: {}

Parameter.name: LedBlinker_cmdSeq_CS_PortSequenceStarted
Parameter.shortDescription: A local port request to run a sequence was started

Parameter.name: LedBlinker_cmdSeq_CS_UnexpectedCompletion
Parameter.shortDescription: A command status came back when no sequence was running

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: Command complete status received while no sequences active. Opcode: {}

Parameter.name: LedBlinker_cmdSeq_CS_ModeSwitched
Parameter.shortDescription: Switched step mode

Parameter.name: LedBlinker_cmdSeq_CS_NoSequenceActive
Parameter.shortDescription: A sequence related command came with no active sequence

Parameter.name: LedBlinker_cmdSeq_CS_SequenceValid
Parameter.shortDescription: A sequence passed validation

Parameter.name: LedBlinker_cmdSeq_CS_SequenceTimeout
Parameter.shortDescription: A sequence passed validation

Parameter.name: LedBlinker_cmdSeq_CS_CmdStepped
Parameter.shortDescription: A command in a sequence was stepped through

Parameter.name: LedBlinker_cmdSeq_CS_CmdStarted
Parameter.shortDescription: A manual sequence was started

Parameter.name: LedBlinker_cmdSeq_CS_JoinWaiting
Parameter.shortDescription: Wait for the current running sequence file complete

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: Start waiting for sequence file {}: Command {} (opcode {}) to complete

Parameter.name: LedBlinker_cmdSeq_CS_JoinWaitingNotComplete
Parameter.shortDescription: Cannot run new sequence when current sequence file is still running.

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: Still waiting for sequence file to complete
Sequence file {} has no records. Ignoring.

Parameter.name: LedBlinker_led_SetBlinkingState
Parameter.shortDescription: Reports the state we set to blinking.

Parameter.name: LedBlinker_led_LedState
Parameter.shortDescription: Event logged when the LED turns on or off

Parameter.name: LedBlinker_led_BlinkIntervalSet
Parameter.shortDescription: Event logged when the LED blink interval is updated

AncillaryDataSet.AncillaryData: Failed to open GPIO chip {} pin {} [{}]: {}
Interrupt data read expected {} byes and got {}

MetaCommand.name: CdhCore_cmdDisp_CMD_NO_OP
MetaCommand.shortDescription: No-op command

MetaCommand.name: CdhCore_cmdDisp_CMD_NO_OP_STRING
MetaCommand.shortDescription: No-op string command

Argument.name: arg1
Argument.shortDescription: The String command argument

MetaCommand.name: CdhCore_cmdDisp_CMD_TEST_CMD_1
MetaCommand.shortDescription: No-op command

Argument.name: arg1
Argument.shortDescription: The I32 command argument

Argument.name: arg2
Argument.shortDescription: The F32 command argument

Argument.name: arg3
Argument.shortDescription: The U8 command argument

MetaCommand.name: CdhCore_cmdDisp_CMD_CLEAR_TRACKING
MetaCommand.shortDescription: Clear command tracking info to recover from components not returning status

MetaCommand.name: CdhCore_events_SET_EVENT_FILTER
MetaCommand.shortDescription: Set filter for reporting events. Events are not stored in component.

Argument.name: filterLevel
Argument.shortDescription: Filter level

Argument.name: filterEnabled
Argument.shortDescription: Filter state

MetaCommand.name: CdhCore_events_SET_ID_FILTER
MetaCommand.shortDescription: Filter a particular ID

Argument.name: idFilterEnabled
Argument.shortDescription: ID filter state

MetaCommand.name: CdhCore_events_DUMP_FILTER_STATE
MetaCommand.shortDescription: Dump the filter states via events

MetaCommand.name: CdhCore_health_HLTH_ENABLE
MetaCommand.shortDescription: A command to enable or disable health checks

Argument.name: enable
Argument.shortDescription: whether or not health checks are enabled

MetaCommand.name: CdhCore_health_HLTH_PING_ENABLE
MetaCommand.shortDescription: Ignore a particular ping entry

Argument.name: entry
Argument.shortDescription: The entry to enable/disable

Argument.name: enable
Argument.shortDescription: whether or not a port is pinged

MetaCommand.name: CdhCore_health_HLTH_CHNG_PING
MetaCommand.shortDescription: Change ping value

Argument.name: entry
Argument.shortDescription: The entry to modify

Argument.name: warningValue
Argument.shortDescription: Ping warning threshold

Argument.name: fatalValue
Argument.shortDescription: Ping fatal threshold

MetaCommand.name: CdhCore_version_ENABLE
MetaCommand.shortDescription: A command to enable or disable Event verbosity and Telemetry

Argument.name: enable
Argument.shortDescription: whether or not Version telemetry is enabled

MetaCommand.name: CdhCore_version_VERSION
MetaCommand.shortDescription: Report version as Event

Argument.name: version_type
Argument.shortDescription: which version type Event is requested

MetaCommand.name: DataProducts_dpCat_BUILD_CATALOG
MetaCommand.shortDescription: Build catalog from data product directory. Will block until complete

MetaCommand.name: DataProducts_dpCat_START_XMIT_CATALOG
MetaCommand.shortDescription: Start transmitting catalog

Argument.name: wait
Argument.shortDescription: have START_XMIT command complete wait for catalog to complete transmitting

MetaCommand.name: DataProducts_dpCat_STOP_XMIT_CATALOG
MetaCommand.shortDescription: Stop transmitting catalog

MetaCommand.name: DataProducts_dpCat_CLEAR_CATALOG
MetaCommand.shortDescription: clear existing catalog

MetaCommand.name: DataProducts_dpMgr_CLEAR_EVENT_THROTTLE
MetaCommand.shortDescription: Clear event throttling

MetaCommand.name: DataProducts_dpWriter_CLEAR_EVENT_THROTTLE
MetaCommand.shortDescription: Clear event throttling

MetaCommand.name: FileHandling_fileDownlink_SendFile
MetaCommand.shortDescription: Read a named file off the disk. Divide it into packets and send the packets for transmission to the ground.

Argument.name: sourceFileName
Argument.shortDescription: The name of the on-board file to send

Argument.name: destFileName
Argument.shortDescription: The name of the destination file on the ground

MetaCommand.name: FileHandling_fileDownlink_Cancel
MetaCommand.shortDescription: Cancel the downlink in progress, if any

MetaCommand.name: FileHandling_fileDownlink_SendPartial
MetaCommand.shortDescription: Read a named file off the disk from a starting position. Divide it into packets and send the packets for transmission to the ground.

Argument.name: sourceFileName
Argument.shortDescription: The name of the on-board file to send

Argument.name: destFileName
Argument.shortDescription: The name of the destination file on the ground

Argument.name: startOffset
Argument.shortDescription: Starting offset of the source file

Argument.name: length
Argument.shortDescription: Number of bytes to send from starting offset. Length of 0 implies until the end of the file

MetaCommand.name: FileHandling_fileManager_CreateDirectory
MetaCommand.shortDescription: Create a directory

Argument.name: dirName
Argument.shortDescription: The directory to create

MetaCommand.name: FileHandling_fileManager_MoveFile
MetaCommand.shortDescription: Move a file

Argument.name: sourceFileName
Argument.shortDescription: The source file name

Argument.name: destFileName
Argument.shortDescription: The destination file name

MetaCommand.name: FileHandling_fileManager_RemoveDirectory
MetaCommand.shortDescription: Remove a directory, which must be empty

Argument.name: dirName
Argument.shortDescription: The directory to remove

MetaCommand.name: FileHandling_fileManager_RemoveFile
MetaCommand.shortDescription: Remove a file

Argument.name: fileName
Argument.shortDescription: The file to remove

Argument.name: ignoreErrors
Argument.shortDescription: Ignore nonexistent files

MetaCommand.name: FileHandling_fileManager_ShellCommand
MetaCommand.shortDescription: Perform a Linux shell command and write the output to a log file.

Argument.name: command
Argument.shortDescription: The shell command string

Argument.name: logFileName
Argument.shortDescription: The name of the log file

MetaCommand.name: FileHandling_fileManager_AppendFile
MetaCommand.shortDescription: Append 1 file's contents to the end of another.

Argument.name: source
Argument.shortDescription: The name of the file to take content from

Argument.name: target
Argument.shortDescription: The name of the file to append to

Argument.name: fileName
Argument.shortDescription: The file to get the size of

MetaCommand.name: FileHandling_fileManager_ListDirectory
MetaCommand.shortDescription: List the contents of a directory

Argument.name: dirName
Argument.shortDescription: The directory to list

MetaCommand.name: FileHandling_prmDb_PRM_SAVE_FILE
MetaCommand.shortDescription: Command to save parameter image to file. Uses file name passed to constructor

MetaCommand.name: FileHandling_prmDb_PRM_LOAD_FILE
MetaCommand.shortDescription: Loads a file from storage into the staging database. The file could have selective IDs and not the whole set.

Argument.name: fileName
Argument.shortDescription: The name of the on-board file to set parameters from

Argument.name: merge
Argument.shortDescription: Whether to merge or fully reset the parameter database from the file contents

MetaCommand.name: FileHandling_prmDb_PRM_COMMIT_STAGED
MetaCommand.shortDescription: Commits the backup database to become the prime (active) database

MetaCommand.name: LedBlinker_cmdSeq_CS_RUN
MetaCommand.shortDescription: Run a command sequence file

Argument.name: fileName
Argument.shortDescription: The name of the sequence file

Argument.name: block
Argument.shortDescription: Return command status when complete or not

MetaCommand.name: LedBlinker_cmdSeq_CS_VALIDATE
MetaCommand.shortDescription: Validate a command sequence file

Argument.name: fileName
Argument.shortDescription: The name of the sequence file

MetaCommand.name: LedBlinker_cmdSeq_CS_CANCEL
MetaCommand.shortDescription: Cancel a command sequence

MetaCommand.name: LedBlinker_cmdSeq_CS_START
MetaCommand.shortDescription: Start running a command sequence

MetaCommand.name: LedBlinker_cmdSeq_CS_STEP
MetaCommand.shortDescription: Perform one step in a command sequence. Valid only if CmdSequencer is in MANUAL run mode.

MetaCommand.name: LedBlinker_cmdSeq_CS_AUTO
MetaCommand.shortDescription: Set the run mode to AUTO.

MetaCommand.name: LedBlinker_cmdSeq_CS_MANUAL
MetaCommand.shortDescription: Set the run mode to MANUAL.

MetaCommand.name: LedBlinker_cmdSeq_CS_JOIN_WAIT
MetaCommand.shortDescription: Wait for sequences that are running to finish. Allow user to run multiple seq files in SEQ_NO_BLOCK mode then wait for them to finish before allowing more seq run request.

MetaCommand.name: LedBlinker_led_BLINKING_ON_OFF
MetaCommand.shortDescription: Command to turn on or off the blinking LED

Argument.name: onOff
Argument.shortDescription: Indicates whether the blinking should be on or off

MetaCommand.name: LedBlinker_led_BLINK_INTERVAL_PRM_SET
MetaCommand.shortDescription: Blinking interval in rate group ticks

MetaCommand.name: LedBlinker_led_BLINK_INTERVAL_PRM_SAVE
MetaCommand.shortDescription: Blinking interval in rate group ticks

MetaCommand.name: LedBlinker_systemResources_ENABLE
MetaCommand.shortDescription: A command to enable or disable system resource telemetry

Argument.name: enable
Argument.shortDescription: whether or not system resource telemetry is enabled
